title: Revenge: Our Dad the Nazi Killer
original_title: Revenge: Our Dad the Nazi Killer
overview: 70 years after a body is found floating in a Sydney river, middle aged Jewish doctor Jack learns his father, a Holocaust survivor, is responsible for the unsolved murder of an alleged Nazi and sets out on a quest to find the truth.
